title: Two Rainy Miles
subtitle: 水水雨中挑战两公里骑行
moral: 勇敢试一试，累了想办法，慢慢也能完成大挑战。

pages.narration: 周六早晨，小雨滴答滴答。小区门口，新修的小道亮晶晶地伸向远方。

dialogue.speaker: shuishui
dialogue.text: 爸爸，我们今天骑到哪里呀？

dialogue.speaker: papa
dialogue.text: 骑到小路的尽头，再骑回来，试试两公里！

pages.composition_hint: white rabbit shuishui wearing a clear transparent hooded raincoat showing a pink dress, riding a small bicycle with a pair of training wheels on the rear wheel at the start of a brick-red paved path with a single white center dividing line; red panda papa wearing a grey hooded raincoat walking beside her in soft blue-grey rainy light, wet reflective ground, young trees and assorted little flowers along both sides.

pages.narration: 挑战开始啦！水水的小车轮，咕噜咕噜转起来。

dialogue.speaker: shuishui
dialogue.text: 爸爸你跑起来，我们比赛，看谁快！

pages.composition_hint: white rabbit shuishui in a clear transparent hooded raincoat riding a small bicycle with rear training wheels fast along the brick-red path; red panda papa in a grey hooded raincoat running on foot beside her, wet path reflecting raindrops, white center line leading forward.

pages.narration: 骑了一小段，小路向左弯过去。右边有一堵高高的墙，墙上有亮亮的玻璃窗。
pages.composition_hint: white rabbit shuishui wearing a clear transparent hooded raincoat riding a small bicycle with rear training wheels around a left bend on the brick-red path; red panda papa in a grey hooded raincoat walking nearby; on the right, a tall safety wall separates the path from a high-speed railway, with rectangular glass windows set into the wall.

pages.narration: 哗——一列火车从玻璃窗后面开过去。水水的耳朵一下子竖得高高的。

dialogue.speaker: papa
dialogue.text: 它在墙那边，我们在小路这边，很安全。

pages.composition_hint: close view of white rabbit shuishui in a clear transparent hooded raincoat sitting on a small bicycle with rear training wheels, eyes wide at a train visible through glass windows in a tall safety wall; red panda papa in a grey hooded raincoat standing on foot beside the bicycle, rainy reflections on the brick-red path.

pages.narration: 再往前，草地上有一个没盖好的圆洞，远远看黑黑的。水水放慢了小车。

dialogue.speaker: shuishui
dialogue.text: 爸爸，那个下水道里是不是有怪兽呀？

dialogue.speaker: papa
dialogue.text: 没有怪兽，但那里不能靠近，我们从小路上快快通过。

pages.composition_hint: white rabbit shuishui in a clear transparent hooded raincoat riding a small bicycle with rear training wheels slowly on the brick-red path; red panda papa in a grey hooded raincoat walking on the path beside her; on the grass to the right, an unfinished manhole drain with its cover off appears as a dark round hole from a distance, mysterious but not scary.

pages.narration: 他们离开圆洞，继续向前。弯弯的小路像一条长长的红丝带，一眼望不到头。
pages.composition_hint: wide rainy view of a winding brick-red paved path with a single white center dividing line stretching far ahead, young trees and assorted little flowers on both sides; white rabbit shuishui wearing a clear transparent hooded raincoat rides a small bicycle with rear training wheels, red panda papa wearing a grey hooded raincoat walks beside her.

pages.narration: 忽然，前面出现一座彩虹拱门。一个个大铁框斜斜排着，像彩虹隧道一样漂亮。
pages.composition_hint: white rabbit shuishui in a clear transparent hooded raincoat riding a small bicycle with rear training wheels toward a rainbow arch tunnel made of several big colorful metal frames arranged at a tilt in a row; red panda papa in a grey hooded raincoat walking on foot with a phone in one paw, rainy path glowing softly.

pages.narration: 水水骑到彩虹拱门中间，停了一小会儿。爸爸给她拍下亮晶晶的雨天照片。
pages.composition_hint: white rabbit shuishui wearing a clear transparent hooded raincoat showing a pink dress sits happily on a small bicycle with rear training wheels in the middle of a rainbow arch tunnel made of tilted colorful metal frames; red panda papa in a grey hooded raincoat stands on foot holding a phone to take a photo, wet brick-red path reflecting rainbow colors.

pages.narration: 拍完照片，水水喝了几口水。爸爸摸摸她的小手，哎呀，凉凉的。

dialogue.speaker: papa
dialogue.text: 小手有点冷，我们暖一暖再出发。

pages.composition_hint: extreme close view of red panda papa in a grey hooded raincoat gently holding white rabbit shuishui's small paws to warm them; shuishui wears a clear transparent hooded raincoat, the handlebar of a small bicycle with rear training wheels and a water bottle visible nearby, soft raindrops on fabric and path.

pages.narration: 小手暖了，水也喝了，挑战继续。前面又有两座彩虹拱门，水水一座一座骑过去。
pages.composition_hint: wide view of two rainbow arch tunnels ahead, each made of several big colorful metal frames arranged at a tilt in a row over the brick-red path; white rabbit shuishui wearing a clear transparent hooded raincoat rides a small bicycle with rear training wheels through the arches, red panda papa wearing a grey hooded raincoat walks on foot along the path.

pages.narration: 骑呀骑，小路终于到了尽头。原来这里是地铁站，还有一座人行天桥和一家香香的包子店。

dialogue.speaker: papa
dialogue.text: 对，半程成功！现在骑回去，就完成两公里。

pages.composition_hint: white rabbit shuishui in a clear transparent hooded raincoat sitting on a small bicycle with rear training wheels near a subway metro station entrance; red panda papa in a grey hooded raincoat standing on foot beside her; a pedestrian footbridge crosses the road in the background and a small steamed-bun baozi shop is nearby, rainy street with soft reflections.

pages.narration: 回家的路上，水水的腿有一点酸。爸爸把一根绳子系在车把上，轻轻在前面牵着。

dialogue.speaker: papa
dialogue.text: 你继续踩，我帮你一点点。

pages.composition_hint: red panda papa wearing a grey hooded raincoat walking on foot in front, holding a rope tied to the handlebar of white rabbit shuishui's small bicycle with rear training wheels; shuishui wears a clear transparent hooded raincoat and keeps riding on the brick-red path with a white center line, gentle rainy reflections.

pages.narration: 不一会儿，他们又回到了起点。两公里，水水自己骑下来了，雨点也像在为她鼓掌。

dialogue.speaker: papa
dialogue.text: 真棒，小小车轮骑出了大大的勇气。

pages.composition_hint: close view of white rabbit shuishui wearing a clear transparent hooded raincoat showing a pink dress, sitting proudly on a small bicycle with rear training wheels at the start point of the brick-red path; red panda papa wearing a grey hooded raincoat standing on foot beside her, wet ground shining, young trees and assorted little flowers in soft blue-grey rain.
